feedback_text: The mobile app crashes every time I try to attach a photo to a support ticket.
Loading the analytics dashboard takes almost two minutes some mornings.
It would be really helpful if we could export our invoices as CSV, not just PDF.
I can never find the settings page, it's buried three menus deep.
I'm locked out of my account after resetting my password twice, still says invalid credentials.
You charged my card three times for one month of service, please fix this.
The API docs still reference the old v1 endpoints that were deprecated last year.
Support closed my ticket without actually resolving the issue, had to reopen it twice.
I noticed that when I share a report link, anyone with the link can edit it even without permission.
Our Salesforce integration stopped syncing contacts three days ago with no error message.
This is honestly the best project management tool we've used, the team adopted it instantly.
Do you guys sponsor any local meetups or conferences?
Wonderful, the export button disappeared again right before my deadline. Just wonderful.
The new invoicing flow isn't nearly as bad as I feared, actually got through it in two minutes.
Your onboarding emails are great but the actual product tour inside the app is confusing and outdated.
Bulk-importing more than 500 rows just times out with no error, smaller files work fine.
The 'export to PDF' button does nothing when I click it, no download, no error.
Le tableau de bord est tres lent a charger le matin, c'est frustrant.
We just discovered a customer's SSN was visible in an exported report we sent externally.
It's fine I guess, does what it says.
Billing support was helpful, but I'm still waiting three weeks for a refund on the duplicate charge.
None of our team can log in this morning, it's blocking our entire standup and client calls.
Can you add a way to reorder columns in the table view? Right now it's fixed.
the aap keeps crashng wheneva i try too upload a file its really anoying
